creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 204445
update to 1.1.10

Changelog from 1.1.8

https://github.com/borgbackup/borg/blob/1.1.10/docs/changes.rst#version-1110-2019-05-16
https://github.com/borgbackup/borg/blob/1.1.10/docs/changes.rst#version-119-2019-02-10

Importante: msgpack is not longer a required dependency, as it is
bundled into the borg source. Thus, every reference to mspack in the
Makefile has been removed.

Some basic testing has been done, and the results are fine, as expected.
